title: Rich Irish Potatoes Bake
description: A delicious and dense Irish dish featuring charlotte potatoes, perfect for a crowd-pleaser meal. Brining the potatoes makes them diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Peel and dice 1 kg of charlotte potatoes, then place them in a large bowl.
Add 150ml of milk, 80g of unsalted butter, 2g of salt, and 2g of black pepper to the potatoes and mix well.
Transfer the potatoes to a greased 20x20cm baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix 200g of grated cheddar cheese, 50g of all-purpose flour, and 4 egg yolks.
Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the potatoes.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
